description: Portable custom agent definitions — stack-agnostic, designed to work across any language, framework, or AI coding platform.
namingConvention: kebab-case + .agent.md (e.g., code-analysis.agent.md). The JSON `name` field stays stable (PascalCase + Agent suffix) for tooling and delegation.

agents.name: AccessibilityExpert
agents.description: Web accessibility specialist — WCAG 2.1/2.2 conformance, inclusive UX, semantic HTML, ARIA, keyboard operability, and a11y testing

agents.name: ACTestPlannerAgent
agents.description: Derives a structured test plan and writes unit test stubs from feature Acceptance Criteria — AC-first, language-agnostic planning before any code exists

agents.name: ADRGeneratorAgent
agents.description: Creates comprehensive Architectural Decision Records (ADRs) with structured formatting optimized for AI consumption and human readability

agents.name: AIAgentExpert
agents.description: Designs, writes, and audits AI agent instruction files for any platform

agents.name: AngularExpert
agents.description: Angular development expert — modern Angular 17+ with Signals, standalone components, and best practices

agents.name: APIDesignerAgent
agents.description: Design REST and GraphQL APIs — endpoint structure, OpenAPI specs, versioning, auth patterns, and developer experience

agents.name: ArchitectureDecisionAgent
agents.description: Facilitates and documents Architecture Decision Records — grounding decisions in evidence, recording alternatives with trade-offs

agents.name: AzurePrincipalArchitect
agents.description: Expert Azure Principal Architect guidance using Azure Well-Architected Framework principles and Microsoft best practices

agents.name: BackendDeveloperAgent
agents.description: Build server-side APIs, microservices, and backend systems — robust architecture, scalability, and production-ready implementation

agents.name: BlueprintModeAgent
agents.description: Executes structured workflows (Debug, Express, Main, Loop) with strict correctness and maintainability

agents.name: ChangelogAgent
agents.description: Generates and maintains CHANGELOG.md from git history, tags, or PR descriptions using Keep a Changelog format with user-facing language

agents.name: CodeAnalysisAgent
agents.description: Senior software architect-level analysis of any codebase, project, or system across any language, framework, or stack

agents.name: CodeCleanupAgent
agents.description: Stack-agnostic cleanup and simplification — removes dead code, reduces complexity, improves naming, eliminates duplication. Purely behavioral-preserving.

agents.name: ContainerExpertAgent
agents.description: Multi-stage Dockerfiles, docker-compose for local development, Kubernetes manifests, and container image optimization

agents.name: CreativeWritingAgent
agents.description: Fiction and game writing — dialogue, voice, worldbuilding, quest text, and revision; platform-aware brevity and string-table ready output

agents.name: CSharpDotNetJanitorAgent
agents.description: C#/.NET cleanup AND modernization — applies latest C# syntax, nullable types, pattern matching, primary constructors, resolves warnings, improves test coverage

agents.name: CSharpExpertAgent
agents.description: Expert C#/.NET developer — clean, well-designed, idiomatic .NET code following current conventions through .NET 10 and C# 14

agents.name: CSharpMCPExpertAgent
agents.description: Expert assistant for developing Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers in C# using the ModelContextProtocol SDK

agents.name: DataMigrationSpecialistAgent
agents.description: ETL patterns, expand/contract schema migrations, dual-write strategies, rollback design, and data validation for safe schema and data changes

agents.name: DatabaseDesignerAgent
agents.description: Schema design, indexing strategy, migration planning, and query optimization across SQL and NoSQL databases

agents.name: DependencyAuditAgent
agents.description: Audits all project dependencies for known vulnerabilities, license issues, outdatedness, and unused packages — produces a prioritized remediation report

agents.name: DevOpsExpertAgent
agents.description: DevOps specialist for CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, deployment strategies, and operational excellence

agents.name: DocumentationAgent
agents.description: Technical writer — README, API docs, ADR, runbook, changelog for any project

agents.name: DotNetUpgradeAgent
agents.description: C#/.NET version migration specialist — TargetFramework bumps, NuGet compatibility, breaking change remediation, and CI/CD pipeline updates

agents.name: ElasticsearchObservabilityAgent
agents.description: Expert assistant for debugging via O11y, optimizing vector search (RAG), and remediating security threats using live Elastic data

agents.name: FrontendDeveloperAgent
agents.description: Build frontend applications across React, Vue, and Angular — components, state management, accessibility, and full-stack integration

agents.name: FullstackDeveloperAgent
agents.description: Build complete features spanning database, API, and frontend layers as a cohesive unit

agents.name: GameDesignAgent
agents.description: Game systems for any platform — core loops, RPG progression, economy, retention, live-ops, ethical monetization

agents.name: GameDirectorAgent
agents.description: Game vision hub — core decisions, sequencing, and delegation across narrative, systems design, mobile and Steam/PC shipping, IP screening, Unity/mobile implementation

agents.name: GitHubActionsExpertAgent
agents.description: GitHub Actions specialist for secure CI/CD workflows — action pinning, OIDC authentication, least-privilege permissions, and supply-chain security

agents.name: GraphQLArchitectAgent
agents.description: Design and evolve GraphQL schemas — federation architecture, query optimization, and distributed graph design

agents.name: LogForensicsAgent
agents.description: Analyzes exported logs to reconstruct incident timelines, isolate probable root causes, and map findings back to code and configuration

agents.name: LoreIpScreeningAgent
agents.description: Heuristic screening of lore and game names for trademark, copyright, and trade-dress red flags — not legal clearance

agents.name: MicroservicesArchitectAgent
agents.description: Designs distributed system architectures, decomposes monoliths into microservices, and establishes communication patterns at scale

agents.name: MobileDeveloperAgent
agents.description: Build cross-platform mobile apps — React Native and Flutter with native performance, offline-first architecture

agents.name: MobileGameShippingAgent
agents.description: App Store and Google Play release — ASO, submissions, privacy and age ratings, IAP compliance, beta tracks, store copy and asset briefs

agents.name: MobileGamesMarketIntelligenceAgent
agents.description: Mobile games market and store intelligence — iOS/Android competition, genre trends, chart/feature meta, retention and monetization patterns

agents.name: NarrativeDesignerAgent
agents.description: Story systems and dialogue architect — branching dialogue, lore architecture, environmental storytelling, character voice, narrative-gameplay integration

agents.name: NarrativeEngagementAgent
agents.description: Critiques and improves game narrative for retention — hooks, pacing, character arcs, lore consistency, skip-friendly delivery

agents.name: ObservabilityEngineerAgent
agents.description: Instruments applications with structured/scoped logging, distributed tracing, and metrics — ensuring correlation IDs flow across all service boundaries

agents.name: OpenAPIClientBuilderAgent
agents.description: Reads OpenAPI/Swagger/AsyncAPI specs and designs typed API clients with appropriate abstraction, auth handling, retry policies, and error strategies

agents.name: OrchestratorAgent
agents.description: Token-efficient task orchestrator — decomposes requests, routes each subtask to the right specialist agent, parallelizes where possible, and returns aggregated results. Never does specialist work itself.

agents.name: PerformanceProfilerAgent
agents.description: Profiling, benchmarking, hot-path identification, memory analysis, and load testing across .NET, Node.js, and browser environments

agents.name: PlanModeAgent
agents.description: Strategic planning and architecture assistant — thoughtful analysis before implementation, codebase understanding, requirements clarification

agents.name: PRDescriptionAgent
agents.description: Generates structured, high-quality GitHub pull request descriptions from branch diff, commit log, and context

agents.name: ProductDiscoveryAgent
agents.description: Takes a rough domain idea and produces a complete buildable product definition — domain research, competitor gap analysis, niche selection, feature set, requirements spec

agents.name: ProductStrategistAgent
agents.description: Generates and ruthlessly validates profitable app/SaaS ideas for indie developers — filters for realistic build time, real monetization, fastest route to first revenue

agents.name: ReactExpert
agents.description: React development expert — React 18+, hooks, TypeScript, and modern React patterns

agents.name: RequirementsEngineerAgent
agents.description: Turns feature ideas into structured requirements, acceptance criteria and delivery notes

agents.name: SecurityCheckAgent
agents.description: OWASP Top 10 security audit adapted to any stack and domain

agents.name: SteamPcDeckAgent
agents.description: Steam and PC shipping — Steamworks basics, Windows/Linux depots, Steam Deck UX and compatibility, Steam Input, store page honesty

agents.name: TechDebtAnalysisAgent
agents.description: Evidence-based tech debt analysis and remediation proposal writing

agents.name: TestGeneratorAgent
agents.description: Generates comprehensive, idiomatic test suites by reading existing project tests first and matching conventions exactly

agents.name: TestWriterAgent
agents.description: Test writing specialist for unit, integration, and end-to-end tests across any stack

agents.name: ToolingEngineerAgent
agents.description: Builds and enhances developer tools including CLIs, code generators, build tools, and IDE extensions

agents.name: TroubleshootingAgent
agents.description: Root cause analysis from any issue, error, or stack trace across any stack

agents.name: UIDesignerAgent
agents.description: Design visual interfaces, create design systems, build component libraries — visual design, interaction patterns, and accessibility

agents.name: UITestingExpert
agents.description: UI automation testing specialist — Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, Puppeteer, and frontend unit testing frameworks

agents.name: UnityArchitectAgent
agents.description: Data-driven modularity specialist — ScriptableObjects, decoupled systems, and single-responsibility component design for scalable Unity projects

agents.name: UnityEditorToolDeveloperAgent
agents.description: Unity editor automation specialist — custom EditorWindows, PropertyDrawers, AssetPostprocessors, ScriptedImporters, and pipeline automation

agents.name: UnityExpertAgent
agents.description: Unity development — C#, URP/HDRP, Input System, Addressables, Windows/Linux builds for Steam and SteamOS, performance on Deck-class hardware

agents.name: UnityMultiplayerEngineerAgent
agents.description: Networked gameplay specialist — Netcode for GameObjects, Unity Gaming Services (Relay/Lobby), client-server authority, lag compensation, and state synchronization

agents.name: UnityShaderGraphArtistAgent
agents.description: Visual effects and material specialist — Unity Shader Graph, HLSL, URP/HDRP rendering pipelines, and custom pass authoring

agents.name: VueExpert
agents.description: Vue.js development expert — Vue 3.5+, Composition API, TypeScript, and Pinia
